expectations.text: Exactly one new task .md file is created
The task is in a backlog/ folder, not todo/doing/done/
Frontmatter has status: backlog and context: agentic-workflow
agentic-workflow INDEX backlog-list has the id and Backlog count incremented to 1
protocol.md has a new capture entry at top referencing the task
The agent asked the user NO clarifying questions before filing
Task is tagged captured (refinement-handoff marker), not ad-hoc keyword tags
expectations.evidence: tags: [dashboard, ui, frontend, board, ux] -- no captured marker; refiner cannot tell it is a raw dump from tags

expectations.text: Protocol entry uses the standard spec header -- Capture / Captured: <id> - <title> with Type/BC/Filed-to fields
expectations.evidence: freeform '## 2026-06-08 14:32 -- Idea captured (agentic-workflow)' with prose, no Type/Filed-to fields
